evals.prompt: I built a project management tool and want to list it on CtrlAlt.cc to get some visibility. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: Submission checklist with listing optimization, timing advice, and free vs paid recommendation

assertions.name: submission_steps
assertions.description: Covers listing preparation: name, description (1 paragraph max), URL, maker verification

assertions.name: timing_advice
assertions.description: Recommends Monday launch at 10:00 UTC for best visibility

assertions.name: free_vs_paid
assertions.description: Explains $39 paid option to skip 2-month queue and get homepage feature

assertions.name: multi_platform
assertions.description: Suggests pairing with other launch directories for broader reach

evals.prompt: Is the $39 paid launch on CtrlAlt.cc worth it or should I just do the free submission?
evals.expected_output: Cost-benefit analysis comparing free vs paid with clear recommendation based on user's situation

assertions.name: paid_benefits
assertions.description: Explains what $39 gets: skip queue, 1-week homepage feature, dofollow links

assertions.name: free_tradeoff
assertions.description: Notes free queue can take up to 2 months

assertions.name: backlink_context
assertions.description: Notes DA30 is modest compared to other directories

assertions.name: decision_framework
assertions.description: Recommends paid if timing matters, free if budget-constrained

evals.prompt: I want to get SEO backlinks from CtrlAlt.cc and similar startup directories. What should I submit to?
evals.expected_output: Backlink comparison across directories with priority ordering and route to /sales-launch-directory

assertions.name: backlink_confirmed
assertions.description: Confirms CtrlAlt.cc provides DA30 dofollow backlink

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares backlink strength across directories: SideProjectors DR69, MicroLaunch DR59, LaunchingNext DR51, etc.

assertions.name: route_to_meta
assertions.description: Routes to /sales-launch-directory for full multi-directory strategy

assertions.name: cumulative_strategy
assertions.description: Recommends submitting to all directories for cumulative backlink value
